title: Systems Fully Surveyed
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM FSSAllBodiesFound WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} system(s) fully surveyed with the FSS during the report period. The chime when the last body registers in a fully scanned system is one of the game's most satisfying sounds — this count shows how many star systems you've documented completely rather than merely passing through.
details.help: FSSAllBodiesFound fires when the FSS has found every body in a system. total drives the title as the complete-survey count.

tagLines: Full system FSS survey completion log compiled. Thoroughly documented systems noted in the cartography record.
The FSS chime when everything is found is its own reward. You heard it this many times.
Most commanders honk and move on. You stayed until the system had given up everything it knew.
